title: Connections, Channels, Heartbeats, Errors, and Recovery · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs connections, channels, heartbeats, errors, and recovery from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the connection, channel, heartbeat, and recovery state machine. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for connection, channel, heartbeat, and recovery state machine after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debu…
objectives: Use bounded long-lived AMQP connections and explain multiplexed channels, negotiated limits, names, TLS, and lifecycle cost.
Assign channel ownership by publisher or consumer lifecycle and prevent concurrent confirm, acknowledgement, and topology operations from corrupting assumptions.
Choose a heartbeat timeout with network and flow-control evidence and distinguish heartbeat interval, TCP keepalive, and false-positive failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Recovery Order Generation
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 8555 in a accessible municipal task intake with two worker pools. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bound heartbeat and reconnect policy while rejecting stale channel-generation callbacks; prove topology rollback before deleting the old binding; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Recreate connection, channels, topology, confirm state, prefetch, consumers, and publisher admission in generation order while rejecting stale callbacks.

Inspect the Recovery Order Generation trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Recovery Order Generation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for recreate connection, channels, topology, confirm state, prefetch, consumers, and publisher admission in generation order while rejecting stale callbacks. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Recovery Order Generation, keep Recovery Order Generation connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using recreate and connection plus specific case evidence.
